title: llm.generate_image
description: Image generation through the configured backend (explicit provider > DEFAULT_IMAGE_PROVIDER). Returns raw provider results — {status: 'ok', images: [{url? | data_b64?, mime}], provider_used: string} or {status: 'failure', reason: string}. Storing images into CDN/asset libraries is the caller's job.

prompt.description: Text description of the desired image(s).

provider.description: Image provider name from STAPEL_AGENT['IMAGE_PROVIDERS']; defaults to DEFAULT_IMAGE_PROVIDER.
